title: Myrciaria oneillii
taxonomy: Myrciaria oneillii is classified within the family Myrtaceae. This family consists of about 145 genera and around 6,000 species, many of which are evergreen trees or shrubs. The genus Myrciaria itself is native to the Americas and comprises several species of tropical plants. Myrciaria oneillii is one of the lesser-known species within this genus. Further research may be necessary to determine the specific classification within the genus.
